notes: Primitive condition functions for directly executable judgement condition code.

absolute_position.name: abs_pos_distance
absolute_position.description: Distance between object bbox center and an absolute anchor point (for example workspace_center).

absolute_position.name: abs_center_xy
absolute_position.description: Normalized center coordinates of object bbox.

relative_position.name: rel_x
relative_position.description: Signed x relation between two object centers. <0 means left_obj is left of right_obj.

relative_position.name: rel_y
relative_position.description: Signed y relation between two object centers. <0 means top_obj is above bottom_obj.

relative_position.name: rel_distance
relative_position.description: Distance between centers of two objects.

hand_dino_relation.name: hand_to_bbox_distance
hand_dino_relation.description: Distance between a hand landmark point and an object bbox center.

hand_dino_relation.name: hand_in_bbox
hand_dino_relation.description: Whether the hand landmark point lies inside the object bbox.
